efs.accesspoint.creationinfo.OwnerGid.Docs: Specifies the POSIX group ID to apply to the `RootDirectory`. Accepts values from 0 to 2^32 (4294967295).

efs.accesspoint.creationinfo.OwnerUid.Docs: Specifies the POSIX user ID to apply to the `RootDirectory`. Accepts values from 0 to 2^32 (4294967295).

efs.accesspoint.creationinfo.Permissions.Docs: Specifies the POSIX permissions to apply to the `RootDirectory`, in the format of an octal number representing the file's mode bits.
